# Luka2Chat

> Luka2Chat is an independent developer focused on generative engine optimization (GEO), AI-powered applications, and gamification systems. All projects are open source and available on GitHub.

## About

Luka is an independent developer who builds in public. Focused areas include curating GEO resources for AI search engine optimization, building gamified tracking systems, and developing LLM-powered tools. Everything is open source from day one.

## Contact

- Website: https://luka2chat.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/luka2chat
- Twitter: https://twitter.com/luka2chat


## Projects

- [awesome-geo](https://github.com/luka2chat/awesome-geo): A curated list of 120+ resources for Generative Engine Optimization — optimizing content for AI search engines like ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, and Google AI Overviews
- [ClawRecord](https://github.com/luka2chat/ClawRecord): Gamified OpenClaw tracking system with XP, levels, achievements, skill trees, daily quests, and a global leaderboard — built with Python and Node.js
- [geo-skills](https://github.com/luka2chat/geo-skills): Production-grade GEO best practices for AI coding agents — 12 rule files covering content strategy, structured data, AI crawler config, and more. Supports Cursor, Claude Code, and 37+ AI agents

## Key Information

- [About](https://luka2chat.com/about): Background on Luka2Chat and development philosophy
- [Blog](https://luka2chat.com/blog): Articles on AI tools, GEO strategies, developer workflows, and tech reviews
- [Services](https://luka2chat.com/services): Available services and project templates
- [Pricing](https://luka2chat.com/pricing): Plans and pricing information
- [Contact](https://luka2chat.com/contact): Get in touch for collaboration or inquiries

## Focus Areas

- Generative Engine Optimization (GEO): Researching and curating best practices for content visibility in AI-powered search engines
- LLM-Powered Applications: Building tools that leverage large language models for developer productivity
- Gamification Systems: Designing engagement mechanics like XP, levels, achievements, and leaderboards
- Open Source Development: All projects are public and open for community collaboration

## Tech Stack

TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, Node.js, React, Astro, Tailwind CSS, Vite
